slides.image_prompt:
Slide 1/7 role=hook. Thai copy: อย่าเริ่มจาก AI Agent เริ่มจากเช็กลิสต์งานซ้ำก่อน
Context • workflow • AI automation. Visual direction: bold cover slide, strong Thai headline based on the real source idea, cute robot mascot, practical AI design/workflow icons, small GenLabs logo in a corner. Hand-drawn Thai sketchnote infographic style. Balanced 50% useful Thai text and 50% graphics: cute robots, icons, arrows, marker lines, rounded cards, section badges, checkmarks, simple diagrams. Mobile-readable mini-lesson: one core idea per slide, enough detail to teach a useful technique, no dense paragraphs. Render the Thai copy exactly as provided; do not substitute similar-looking Thai words or alter spelling. Thai spelling QA: use กฎ not กฏ, use ชัดขึ้น without an extra space, use โทนแบรนด์ not ทงแบรนด์, keep ด้วย AI ใน 5 ขั้นตอน together in that order, and keep product/tool names exactly as written. Include a small GenLabs logo/brand mark in a corner or footer, never oversized. Do not include analytics, learning-loop elements, or fake dashboards.

clean_brief.clean_headline: How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth Vimas Tech AI is no longer just a chatbot—it has become one of t
clean_brief.clean_summary: How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth Vimas Tech AI is no longer just a chatbot—it has become one of the most powerful business tools for entrepreneurs, startups, freelancers, and ... Transcript: How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth Description How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth 1 Likes 1 Views 21h Ago AI is no longer just a chatbot—it has become one of the most powerful business tools for entrepreneurs, startups, freelancers, and business owners. In this video, you'll discover how AI can automate lead generation, sales, customer delivery, hiring, and business operations so your company can grow 24/7. Learn how successful entrepreneurs identify business bottlenecks and use AI to solve them. We cover the complete business growth framework, including attention, lead generation, sales, delivery, and customer retention. You'll also learn the powerful 10/80/10 Rule, which helps you maintain your creative control while letting AI perform the majority of the work. This video also explains the Camcorder Method, a simple technique for training AI to perform repetitive tasks by recording your workflow and using transcripts as context. Whether you're running a startup, an online business, an agency, or a small business, these AI strategies can help you save time, increase productivity, and scale faster. 🚀 In this video you'll learn: • How AI helps businesses operate 24/7 • The biggest bottlenecks preventing business growth • AI lead generation and automated sales systems • Personalized AI outreach and follow-up automation • The 10/80/10 Rule for AI-assisted work • The Camcorder Method to train AI on your workflow • Practical AI automation strategies for entrepreneurs • How to build scalable business systems using AI If you found this video valuable, don't forget to Like, Comment, Share, and Subscribe to *VimasTech* for more AI tutorials, automation strategies, business growth tips, and productivity content. clean_brief.raw_text:
YouTube title: How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth
Channel: Vimas Tech
Description: AI is no longer just a chatbot—it has become one of the most powerful business tools for entrepreneurs, startups, freelancers, and ...
Transcript:
Title: How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth Description How to Build a $10M Business with AI in 2026 | AI Automation, Lead Generation & Business Growth 1 Likes 1 Views 21h Ago AI is no longer just a chatbot—it has become one of the most powerful business tools for entrepreneurs, startups, freelancers, and business owners. In this video, you'll discover how AI can automate lead generation, sales, customer delivery, hiring, and business operations so your company can grow 24/7. Learn how successful entrepreneurs identify business bottlenecks and use AI to solve them. We cover the complete business growth framework, including attention, lead generation, sales, delivery, and customer retention. You'll also learn the powerful 10/80/10 Rule, which helps you maintain your creative control while letting AI perform the majority of the work. This video also explains the Camcorder Method, a simple technique for training AI to perform repetitive tasks by recording your workflow and using transcripts as context. Whether you're running a startup, an online business, an agency, or a small business, these AI strategies can help you save time, increase productivity, and scale faster. 🚀 In this video you'll learn: • How AI helps businesses operate 24/7 • The biggest bottlenecks preventing business growth • AI lead generation and automated sales systems • Personalized AI outreach and follow-up automation • The 10/80/10 Rule for AI-assisted work • The Camcorder Method to train AI on your workflow • Practical AI automation strategies for entrepreneurs • How to build scalable business systems using AI If you found this video valuable, don't forget to Like, Comment, Share, and Subscribe to *VimasTech* for more AI tutorials, automation strategies, business growth tips, and productivity content. generation_qa_checklist: Content-graphic match: every icon, diagram, UI mockup, and visual metaphor must directly support the exact Thai copy on that slide.
No hallucinated product claims: use only source facts, provided keywords, and GenLabs teaching interpretation; do not invent dates, metrics, features, dashboards, or partnerships.
Source-media discipline: if source images are provided, borrow only broad layout/mood/interaction cues; do not copy exact source text, UI, brand styling, or composition.
Thai readability: mobile-readable, natural Thai, no clipped words, no garbled characters, no typos, and no dense paragraphs.
Carousel coherence: slide order must tell one mini-story from hook to problem to why it matters to steps to CTA.
Public safety: no public external links, X handles, channel labels, creator names, or attribution text in generated images or caption; attribution stays internal in Airtable/manifest.

social_post.description:
👋 เหมาะกับใคร: คนเริ่มใช้ AI, เจ้าของร้าน, คนทำคอนเทนต์, ฟรีแลนซ์ หรือทีมเล็กที่อยากเอา AI ไปใช้กับงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่ดูข่าวแล้วผ่านไป

💡 ไอเดียหลัก: หลายคนอยากทำ AI Agent แต่ยังไม่รู้ว่างานซ้ำจริง ๆ ของตัวเองคืออะไร เลยดู tutorial เยอะแล้วทำต่อไม่ได้

📌 ทำไมควรเซฟโพสต์นี้: โพสต์แนว agent/workflow ชนะเมื่อสอนให้เริ่มจากงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่โชว์เครื่องมือ

✅ วิธีเอาไปใช้แบบง่าย ๆ:

1) ✨ จดงานซ้ำที่ทำทุกสัปดาห์ 5 อย่าง

2) ✨ เลือกงานที่มีกฎชัดที่สุด 1 งาน

3) ✨ เขียน input/output ที่ต้องการ

4) ✨ ให้ AI ช่วยทำเช็กลิสต์ก่อน แล้วค่อยต่อ automation

🧪 ลองเริ่มวันนี้: วันนี้เลือกงานซ้ำ 1 งาน แล้วเขียนเช็กลิสต์ให้ AI ช่วยทำทีละขั้น

🧭 วิธีใช้กับงานนี้: จดงานซ้ำที่ทำทุกสัปดาห์ 5 อย่าง → เลือกงานที่มีกฎชัดที่สุด 1 งาน → เขียน input/output ที่ต้องการ

🌱 มือใหม่ให้เริ่มจากเคสจริงเล็ก ๆ ของอุตสาหกรรมนี้ แล้วให้คนในทีมตรวจคำตอบก่อนใช้กับลูกค้าจริง

🔖 เซฟโพสต์นี้ไว้เป็นเช็กลิสต์ แล้วลองทำตาม 1 รอบวันนี้ ถ้าทำได้ คุณจะเห็นว่า AI ช่วยลดงานซ้ำและทำให้บริการชัดขึ้นได้จริง

🚀 ติดตาม GenLabs AI Learning สำหรับบทเรียน AI ภาษาไทยที่สั้น เข้าใจง่าย และเอาไปใช้กับงาน/ธุรกิจได้ทันที
social_post.title: อย่าเริ่มจาก AI Agent เริ่มจากเช็กลิสต์งานซ้ำก่อน #AIมือใหม่ เอาไปใช้กับงานจริงได้ทันที

evidence: This is trending because people can copy the workflow immediately instead of only reading AI news.
